Petition For Instructions Re Discovery Of Copy Of Will
Off Calendar Aug-23-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch, for petitioner Jewish Family & Children's Services.

Nancy Rasch advised the Court that no one had filed any objection or separate petition regarding the discovered purported will. The Court granted the petition for instructions to administrator re discovery of copy of will (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Chan. (Not reported)

Petition For Instructions Re Discovery Of Copy Of Will
Off Calendar Aug-01-2016 Continued To Aug-15-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for (petitioner) Jewish Family & Children's Services.

The Court stated that it needs a copy of the letter sent to the people named in the will and instructed counsel to file a copy of it. The Petition for Instructions re Discovery of Copy of Will was continued to August 15, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Saephan (Not Reported)
